text: Every workman shall be entitled to the rights set forth herein.
Benefits under this scheme shall be available only to permanent employees earning above Rs. 15,000 per month. Contract workers and gig economy workers are excluded.
Urban employees working in tier-1 cities shall receive enhanced medical benefits. Employees in rural areas shall receive basic benefits only.
Workers who cannot complete the service requirement due to disability or illness shall not be eligible unless specifically approved by the designated authority.
The government may, at its discretion, extend or restrict the application of this Act to any class of workers as may be deemed necessary.
The worker shall have no further right of appeal and the decision shall be final and binding.
Parental leave shall be available on equal terms to all eligible workers regardless of gender or marital status.
Workers in rural and urban areas shall receive the same baseline health protection, subject to transparent evidence-based top-ups.
The authority shall publish written eligibility criteria, provide reasons for every decision, and allow independent review.
Benefits shall be available to permanent, contract, and gig workers using objective need-based criteria.
